fact_nuggets.text: Tinted Lens (Japanese: Tinted Glasses) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts damage that the Pokemon inflicts with moves that are not very effective. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD If the Pokemon uses a move that is not very effective, its power goes up! MD RT DX If the Pokemon uses a move that is not very effective, the move's power goes up.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens doubles the damage done by any moves that the Pokemon uses which are "not very effective". This effect is independent of whether the type effectiveness is or less. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens doubles the damage done by any moves that the Pokemon uses which are "not very effective". This effect is independent of whether the type effectiveness is or less.
Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.
